description_long: This is a whimsical, dark gray top hat adorned with two large, white, upward-curving rabbit ears attached symmetrically on either side. The front of the hat features a red rectangular panel with a white, ornate, lace-like design, and a prominent red bow with a central gold medallion and pearl accent. A blue satin ribbon encircles the base of the crown, adding a touch of color contrast. The brim is wide and flat, with the decorative elements concentrated at the front. The hat's playful design and bold embellishments suggest a fantasy or costume theme, reminiscent of the Mad Hatter from Alice in Wonderland.
description: A dark gray top hat with large white rabbit ears, a blue ribbon, and a red bow with a gold medallion and pearl at the front. Decorative lace and whimsical elements give it a fantasy or costume appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing both rabbit ears, the red bow with gold medallion and pearl, and the ornate red and white panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curvature of the rabbit ears and the blue ribbon, with the red bow partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the blue ribbon and the symmetrical placement of the rabbit ears, with no decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the ear curvature and a glimpse of the red bow and panel.
